data.title: Dogecoin Jumps 10% In A Week: What Is Going On?
data.description: In the past week, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has experienced a 10% increase, boosted by a significant rise in on-chain activity and accumulation by large holders. According to Santiment data, Dogecoin witnessed 739 large transactions exceeding $100,000 each in a single day, marking its highest level in six months. The concentration of holdings among major wallets is also notable, with 149 addresses holding 100 million DOGE or more controlling approximately 108.52 billion DOGE, valued at around $11.6 billion. This surge in price, which amounts to about 14% over 10 days, seems to be primarily fueled by accumulation from large investors.

data.title: AMD Delivers 5x Stock Returns, Steamrolls Nvidia
data.description: In April, Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD) had contrasting performances. NVDA saw a 14.4% gain, while AMD surged by 74.3%, marking a significant shift in investor sentiment. AMD's impressive growth outpaced NVDA's, delivering over five times the return, according to data from Benzinga Pro. This surge reflects a change in appetite among traders, who are now reevaluating AMD as the frontrunner in AI hardware, despite Nvidia's stronghold in AI accelerators. While Nvidia maintains dominance in the market, with unmatched scale, software advantages, and momentum in data centers, AMD is emerging as the higher-beta alternative as investors seek opportunities in the expanding AI infrastructure sector. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund Declares May 2026 Distribution
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on May 1, 2026, the DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund announced a distribution of $0.11 per share for May 2026. This Fund is listed on the New York Stock Exchange as DSL. The declared distributions are subject to certain conditions.

data.title: SOUTHERN NEVADA'S FIRST-EVER EXTREME HEAT SUMMIT CONVENES ELECTED OFFICIALS, PUBLIC AGENCIES, RESEARCHERS, COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS TO DISCUSS, DEVELOP HEAT MITIGATION STRATEGIES
data.description: Summit introduces the Southern Nevada Transportation Resilience Improvement Plan in response to escalating temperatures in the region. Recently, the Regional Transportation Commission of Southern Nevada (RTC) gathered to address the issue. This initiative aims to enhance the transportation system's resilience. The plan comes after experiencing unprecedented heat waves in Southern Nevada. The RTC is taking proactive measures to prepare for future challenges. This announcement was made on May 1, 2026, in Las Vegas.

data.title: Senseonics Holdings, Inc. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call for May 7, 2026 at 4:30 P.M. Eastern Time
data.description: Senseonics Holdings, Inc., a medical technology company specializing in long-term, implantable continuous glucose monitoring systems for diabetes patients, disclosed its intention to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, following the market's closure. The company (NASDAQ: SENS) is headquartered in Germantown, Md. This announcement is significant for investors and stakeholders keen to evaluate the company's performance and financial standing.

data.title: Court Sanction of Scheme of Arrangement
data.description: In Miami on May 1, 2026, it was reported that Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE: CCL, LSE: CCL) received shareholder approval on April 20, 2026, for the DLC Unification plan. This plan involves merging the dual-listed company structure of Carnival Corporation and Carnival plc.

data.title: Assouline Launches Culture Lounge, a Podcast Convening the Voices Shaping How We Live, Travel, Create, and Collect
data.description: In its second season, the series features prominent figures such as Darren Star, Miles Redd, Stellene Volandes, Simon Kim, Ken Fulk, and Valentina De Santis, and is hosted by Alex Assouline. Luxury publisher Assouline recently unveiled their latest offering, "Culture," on May 1, 2026 in New York.

data.title: NYX Professional Makeup Partners with Mars to Unveil Limited-Edition M&M'S Smushy Surprize Blind Bags
data.description: Los Angeles, May 1, 2026 - NYX Professional Makeup, a renowned global beauty brand recognized for its innovative pop culture collaborations, has unveiled an exciting surprise. The company has partnered with a forthcoming project, delving into nostalgia, further solidifying its reputation for unexpected twists. This collaboration marks a milestone for NYX Professional Makeup, known for its significant social media presence and viral campaigns.

data.title: Shaw Industries Releases 2025 Corporate Sustainability Report
data.description: Shaw Industries Group, Inc., a renowned provider of flooring and surface solutions worldwide, recently showcased the effects of its sustain[HUMAN]ability® strategy in Dalton, Georgia on May 1, 2026. The company unveiled its 2025 corporate sustainability report, marking its 18th annual publication. This report delves into the specifics of Shaw's ongoing efforts to enhance its sustainability practices and highlights key achievements made throughout the year.

data.title: European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust Announces Completion of Going-Private Transaction with Canadian Apartment Properties Real Estate Investment Trust
data.description: This announcement is classified as a "designated news release" for the CAPREIT's prospectus supplement issued on May 15, 2025, related to its short form base shelf prospectus from the same date.

data.title: BJ’s Wholesale Club Announces Waxahachie, Texas Grand Opening
data.description: BJ’s Wholesale Club will be opening a new location in Waxahachie, Texas on May 8, and can be found at 2180 N US Highway 77. To mark the occasion, Waxahachie BJ’s Gas will be offering members a special promotion of $2 per gallon on gas for one day only on Wednesday, May 6 from 6:30 a.m. to 10:00 p.m. This offer applies to regular gas purchases with a limit of 30 gallons per member. Residents in the area are encouraged to sign up in advance to become members and take advantage of this limited-time deal.

data.title: Taskrabbit Joins the Roster, Tackling the Logistics of Growth for the Golden State Storm
data.description: The Golden State Storm, Oakland's latest women's professional tackle football team, has revealed a new collaboration with Taskrabbit, a home services marketplace, for the 2026 season. Under the theme "Game Day, Done. — By Taskrabbit," this partnership aims to enhance the fan experience and boost community involvement throughout the San Francisco Bay Area. Taskrabbit's role as a Founding Sponsor will involve complete integration within the team's activities.

data.title: Comstock Announces ParkX Entry Into Hospitality With Two Starbucks Locations
data.description: Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. revealed today that ParkX Management has taken over management duties for two Starbucks-licensed locations in Reston Station, Reston, Virginia, and Loudoun Station, Ashburn, Virginia. Comstock, a notable asset manager, developer, and operator in the Washington, D.C., region, made the recent announcement. ParkX will be responsible for overseeing operations at these locations within Comstock's premier mixed-use, transit-oriented developments. This move signifies a strategic partnership aimed at enhancing services for visitors and residents in these areas.

data.title: Growing demand for senior housing drives Vineyard Park's expansion into Seattle's First Hill area.
data.description: A recent report states that the global population has reached 7.8 billion people, with approximately 60% of the world's population residing in Asia. Furthermore, the report highlights that over 3.2 billion people are active social media users, showing a significant increase in digital connectivity worldwide. The data also reveals that around 2.5 billion individuals are currently employed in the global workforce. This information signifies the continued growth and interconnectedness of the world's population.

data.title: Brooks Running Delivers Strongest Quarter in Brand’s History
data.description: In Seattle, Brooks Running started off the year 2026 with robust growth in the first quarter, experiencing double-digit increases. The demand for the brand's performance running products, including footwear and apparel, continued to be high.

data.title: Salesforce Provides Fiscal 2027 Disaggregated Revenue Reporting Update
data.description: In San Francisco, Salesforce announced updates to its revenue reporting structure for fiscal year 2027. The company, listed as CRM on the NYSE, introduced changes to highlight its performance in the Agentic Enterprise. This innovative approach focuses on utilizing agents to revolutionize customer development, sales, service, and engagement. Currently, customer support cases on help.salesforce.com are handled by a combination of agents and humans, representing the future standard for all customer interactions. Salesforce aims to expand this model throughout the enterprise to enhance data management and promote seamless customer experiences.

data.title: Global Payments Company Fun Raises $72 Million in Series A to Power Next-Gen Financial Services
data.description: In New York, Fun, a payments infrastructure company supporting major internet-based capital markets like Polymarket, revealed a successful $72 million Series A funding round today. This funding, co-led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire, is in response to the rising need for swift and dependable global money transfers in fintech and digital markets. Established in 2022, Fun operated discreetly to develop its unique technology, positioning itself as the payments foundation for various platforms.

data.title: Bespoke Partners Welcomes Alyssa Berardi as New Partner in Go-to-Market Executive Recruiting Practice
data.description: A new Partner, Alyssa Berardi, has recently joined Bespoke Partners in their Go-To-Market Practice in Austin, Texas.

data.title: U.S. Enterprises Structure SAP Modernization with Measurable Value Checkpoints
data.description: A recent report by ISG reveals that numerous American companies are breaking down SAP transformation initiatives into smaller phases with key milestones showcasing tangible business results. This approach allows enterprises to handle the process more effectively.

data.title: DraftKings Announces Paul Liberman’s Participation in Upcoming Event
data.description: In Boston, DraftKings Inc. (Nasdaq: DKNG) disclosed that Paul Liberman, the President of Operations and Co-Founder, will be part of an event, The Milken Institute Global Conference. The panel, The Future of Decision Intelligence, is set for May 4 from 2:30–3:30 p.m. PDT (5:30–6:30 p.m. EDT). For more details and a free public livestream access, visit https://milkeninstitute.org.
